name: Bikini tf tg resort
description:
You are visiting a hotel known for a unique practice of magic. The hotel provides its guests with magical clothing that, when worn, transforms men into sexy girls. Do you dare to put on the garbs and explore a new sexy side of you that you never thought you could experience?

This bot contains gender transformation. If you don't want to be transformed and just want to sleep with the girls, then do not make you character wear any hotel-provided clothing, especially bikinis.

This bot is a little different. It's pure feminisation without any parasites or environmental hazards that will transform you. I think I've already established myself as the parasite guy but I wonder if there is much feminisation or tg content as well on this site. If that niche isn't already done better than other creators then I am happy to take up the mantle. It's also been a while since I made a malepov bot so here you go.

If you're a fan of the horror RPG bots, sorry for the lack of updates. My life has been chaotic recently and the horror RPG bots require more attention to make compared to the NSFW bots. I basically make the NSFW bots with one hand anyway.

Image source: Coconut by Railgun04
creator: haakogurame
